briefdescription.para: end of the node. The start is given by parent coords.

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, double dia, double length, unsigned int numDivs)
memberdef.name: CylBase

detaileddescription.para: Returns a vector with the coordinates of the specified MeshEntry. The MeshEntry (entry argument) is a voxel within this CylBase, 'entry' is indexed from 0 to numDivs. The parent is the parent CylBase with its own set of coords. The function does interpolation from the ends of the Node. These are detailed coordinates representative of the shape of the MeshEntry. For cylinders it is x1y1z1 x2y2z2 r0 r1 phi0 phi1 For spheres it is xyzdia.
Virtual function to return coords of mesh Entry. For Cylindrical mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2 r0 r1 phi0 phi1

Returns diffusion cross-section from specified index to next. For index 0, this is cross-section to parent. For index numDivs-1, it is the cross-section from the second-last to the last voxel in this CylBase. Thus there is no valid value for (index == numDivs - 1), it has to be computed external to the CylBase, typically by calling the getDiffusionArea for the child CylBase.

Returns diffusion cross-section from specified index to previous. For index 0, this is cross-section area of parent. For index numDivs-1, it is the cross-section from the second-last to the last voxel in this CylBase. For index numDivs it is the area of this CylBase. Thus there is no valid value for (index > numDivs), it has to be computed external to the CylBase, typically by calling the getDiffusionArea for the child CylBase.

briefdescription.para: Return cross-section area of middle of specified voxel.

detaileddescription.para: Return the cross section area of the middle of the specified voxel.

briefdescription.para: Return length of voxel. All are equal.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ChemCompt *other, const CylBase &parent, unsigned int startIndex, double granularity, vector< VoxelJunction > &ret, bool useCylinderCurve, bool useCylinderCap) const
memberdef.name: matchCubeMeshEntries

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, const CylBase &parent, double &linePos, double &r) const
memberdef.name: nearest

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, const CylBase &parent, unsigned int &index) const
memberdef.name: nearest

memberdef.argsstring: (double h, double dia1, double granularity) const
memberdef.name: selectGridSize

detaileddescription.para: Utility commands for building interface to cube mesh

briefdescription.para: Returns vol of current node. Usually needs to refer to parent.

detaileddescription.para: The entire volume for a truncated cone is given by: V = 1/3 pi.length.(r0^2 + r0.r1 + r1^2) where the length is the length of the cone r0 is radius at base r1 is radius at top. Note that this converges to volume of a cone if r0 or r1 is zero, and to the volume of a cylinder if r0 == r1.

Returns volume of MeshEntry. This isn't the best subdivision of the cylinder from the viewpoint of keeping the length constants all the same for different volumes. Ideally the thinner segments should have a smaller length. But this is simple and so is the diffusion calculation, so leave it. Easy to fine-tune later by modifying how one computes frac0 and frac1.
